title: odontarrhena lanigera
intro: Odontarrhena lanigera, also known as Alpine Cordial or Alpine Cordial Root, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Odontarrhena lanigera include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
